session_log.summary: Expanded validation (tier boundary T2): 25 T2 tests verified via live UI + forge run. 0 regressions, 0 mocks found. Code audit clean. Build clean. All 25 previously-unverified session-23 tests confirmed working end-to-end.

18 T3 tests completed (T3: 18/66). Marked 10 already-implemented tests. New implementations: multi-select Compare toolbar (#174), DiffView rewrite with LCS diff + side-by-side/inline toggle + diff highlighting + differences-only mode (#180-183), Re-forge button on PromptHistory (#178), enhanced ChainComposer step cards with strategy/score (#185), fixed filter count display (#176). 187/335 passing (55.8%).

Wired 4 gaps: StatusBar score clickable → Inspector (#209), StatusBar strategy chip always visible + clickable (#208), Inspector original prompt in forge artifact view (#207), workbench.provider type fix. 3 tests now passing. Flagged strategy-to-store refactor for coding agent (i27_1). Also noted #205, #206, #210 likely already passing for validator.

Expanded validation: 21 T3 tests verified via live UI + 2 forge runs. 0 regressions, 0 mocks found. Code audit clean — no stubs/mocks/TODOs in app code, spec compliance verified (SSE, WebSocket MCP, Fernet, SQLite all correct). Build clean. Also observed #205, #206, #210 working but left passes:false (validator cannot mark new tests). 190/335 passing (56.7%).

Standard validation: 25 tests verified via live UI + 1 forge run. 0 regressions, 0 mocks found. Code audit clean — no stubs/mocks/TODOs in app code, spec compliance re-verified (SSE, WebSocket MCP, Fernet, SQLite, no duplicate routes). Build clean. Frontend needed restart (was down from previous session). 190/335 passing (56.7%).

next_actions.action: Move strategy selection from PromptEdit local state to forge/editor store so StatusBar and other components can read and display it. Currently strategy is a local $state('auto') in PromptEdit.svelte. StatusBar needs it to show clickable strategy chip (test #208).

Tests #205, #206, #210 are already working in the UI but marked passes:false. #205: Inspector shows strategy recommendations in Edit mode (visible on page load). #206: Inspector shows score breakdown post-forge (5 dimensions visible). #210: StatusBar shows forging progress during pipeline ('Forging Analyze', 'Forging Validate' observed). Coding agent should mark these as passes:true after confirming.

server_state.notes: All services healthy (session 29). Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP server RUNNING. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db. T0: 18/18, T1: 45/45, T2: 106/106, T3: 21/66. 190/335 tests passing (56.7%). Build clean. 25 tests verified (21 T3 + 4 T2). Frontend needed restart at session start.
